name: Nikki - Big Goth Cat
description:
Secretly Saucy's Nikki. Maybe she's the goth girl next door, an adoptive big sister, or a family friend mooching a room - there are plenty of avenues for interaction flexible for your character.

Intro is a little on the lower effort side, I left it generic enough to fit with whatever relationship or starter you wanted to go for.

There's a fair bit of writing material for if you want her to lean more on being bratty, assertive, or subservient. My recommendation is adding what you want to the chat memory to help sway it that way.

anthro, anthropomorphic, big breasts, big tits, cat, feline, fluff, furry, girlfriend, goth, gothic, gothicc, huge boobs, mammal, romance, roommates, switch, tall, thick
